Privacy-first ad blocking

Block Ads Everywhere — Without Tracking You

AdShield Pro is built for people who want clean browsing and real privacy. Blocking happens locally on your device using offline-first rules — so your browsing stays yours.

Get AdShield Pro See features
What it blocks
  • Banner ads and sponsored blocks
  • Pop-ups and overlays
  • Auto-play and intrusive page elements
  • Common ad scripts and third-party embeds
Why it's different

Unlike ad blockers that rely on cloud syncing or telemetry, AdShield Pro focuses on local-only filtering and per-site controls. Learn more about our privacy policy and how we keep things offline-first.

Need a quick setup? Follow How to Block Ads on Chrome. If a page breaks, see How to Fix Broken Sites.

Want more control?

Start free, then unlock advanced controls with a one-time Pro upgrade — no subscription. See details on the pricing page.

Clean browsing, by default

Install AdShield Pro and browse faster with less distraction — while keeping your data private.
